dialogueLines.dialogueText: You just shot out the whiskey. Great Job!
Now, to introduce the mixers. You started out this tutorial with the Ginger Ale mixer.
This makes your regular attacks deal less damage and the projectiles you whip back do more damage.
For this next obstacle, press Tab to switch to the Apple Cider, which makes you move faster but makes your shots less accurate.
If you don't get this speed boost, you won't be able to get across before the gate closes. Good luck!
